content.cn_text: Agent：你好，今天有什么可以帮您？
content.en_text: Agent: Hello, how can I help you today?

content.cn_text: Caller：啊，是的，你好。
content.en_text: Caller: Ah yes, hello.

content.cn_text: 我打电话是因为我在你们网站上看到一处房产广告，
content.en_text: I'm just phoning you as I have seen an advertisement on your website for a property

content.cn_text: 我有兴趣租下来。
content.en_text: that I'm interested in renting.

content.cn_text: 如果可以的话，我想在安排看房前了解更多信息。
content.en_text: If possible, I'd like to find out some more information before I organise a viewing.

content.cn_text: Agent：完全没问题。
content.en_text: Agent: No problem at all.

content.cn_text: 您想咨询的房产地址是什么？
content.en_text: What is the address of the property that you'd like to inquire about?

content.cn_text: Caller：是 21 North Avenue。
content.en_text: Caller: It's 21 North Avenue.

content.cn_text: Agent：好的，您想了解什么？
content.en_text: Agent: Okay, what is it that you'd like to know?

content.cn_text: Caller：首先，我想知道这个办公室有什么设施，因为我需要确保
content.en_text: Caller: First of all, I'd like to know what facilities the office has, as I need to make sure that

content.cn_text: 它适合我的广告公司。
content.en_text: it'll be suitable for my advertising company.

content.cn_text: Agent：明白。
content.en_text: Agent: I see.

content.cn_text: 这个办公室包含一个大型开放式空间，临街面很宽，面对一条繁忙街道，
content.en_text: The office contains a large open plan space with a wide frontage onto a busy street with

content.cn_text: 有很多行人经过。
content.en_text: lots of passers-by.

content.cn_text: 所以您的公司会有很好的临街展示度。
content.en_text: So your business would have a really good street presence.

content.cn_text: 那里还有厕所，以及新装修的厨房，配有洗碗机和烤箱。
content.en_text: There was also a toilet and newly refurbished kitchen equipped with dishwasher and oven.

content.cn_text: Caller：哇，听起来不错。
content.en_text: Caller: Wow, that sounds great.

content.cn_text: 我肯定想登记一下我的意向。
content.en_text: I'd definitely like to register my interest.

content.cn_text: Agent：好的，非常好。
content.en_text: Agent: Okay, perfect.

content.cn_text: 如果可以的话，我需要记录一些您的信息。
content.en_text: I just need to take some details from you, if that's okay.

content.cn_text: 您的全名是什么？
content.en_text: What is your full name?
Caller: Jonathan Smith. Caller：Jonathan Smith。

content.cn_text: Agent：Jonathan，您在公司担任什么职位？
content.en_text: Agent: And what position do you hold in your company, Jonathan?

content.cn_text: Caller：直到最近我还是销售经理，不过最近我被提升为区域经理，
content.en_text: Caller: Until recently I was sales manager, however I've recently been promoted to regional manager,

content.cn_text: 所以我会负责运营我们的新办公室。
content.en_text: so I'll be in charge of running our new office.

content.cn_text: 我能问一下办公室在哪里吗？
content.en_text: Can I ask where the office is located?

content.cn_text: Agent：当然。
content.en_text: Agent: Yes, of course.

content.cn_text: 它位于市中心，就在 Royal Square Shopping Centre 拐角附近。
content.en_text: It's located downtown just around the corner from Royal Square Shopping Centre.

content.cn_text: Caller：嗯，对我来说那里离中心位置有点远。
content.en_text: Caller: Hmm, that's a bit too far out of the centre for my liking.

content.cn_text: 我更希望办公室靠近车站。
content.en_text: I'd much prefer to be located in close proximity to the station.

content.cn_text: 你们有那个区域附近的房产吗？
content.en_text: Do you have any property located in that vicinity?

content.cn_text: Agent：如果您能告诉我有多少员工将在办公室工作，
content.en_text: Agent: It would help me to narrow down the results if you could tell me how many employees you

content.cn_text: 这会帮助我缩小搜索范围。
content.en_text: intend to have working in the office.

content.cn_text: Caller：我们的分部有30名员工，还需要额外空间用于会议和演示。
content.en_text: Caller: Our branch is made up of 30 employees and we'd like some extra space for meetings and presentations.

content.cn_text: Agent：大多数普通办公室大约是8000平方英尺，但听起来您需要
content.en_text: Agent: Most average office spaces are around 8,000 square feet, but it sounds like you would need

content.cn_text: 比这个更大的空间。
content.en_text: more space than that.

content.cn_text: 我认为10000平方英尺会更适合您的需求。
content.en_text: I think that 10,000 square feet would be more suitable for your needs.

content.cn_text: 现在看看，我们有10处符合这些条件的房产，所以我们来继续缩小
content.en_text: Now, let's see, we have 10 properties that match those criteria, so let's try and narrow

content.cn_text: 范围。
content.en_text: it down.

content.cn_text: 在听剩余对话之前，你有一些时间浏览
content.en_text: Before you hear the rest of the conversation, you have some time to look at questions

content.cn_text: 第5至第10题。
现在请听录音，并回答第5至第10题。
content.en_text: Now, listen and answer questions 5 to 10.

content.cn_text: Agent：您还有其他要求吗？
content.en_text: Agent: Do you have any other requirements?

content.cn_text: Caller：我们每天需要进入办公室12小时，但安保应该是24小时。
content.en_text: Caller: Well, we'll need access to the office 12 hours a day, but security should be 24 hour.

content.cn_text: 我们场所内不存放现金，但保护客户
content.en_text: We don't hold any money on the premises, but it's crucial that we protect our customer

content.cn_text: 信息不被盗非常重要。
content.en_text: information against theft.

content.cn_text: Agent：好的，还有其他要求吗？
content.en_text: Agent: Okay, anything else?

content.cn_text: Caller：有，理想情况下，我希望新办公室分为两层，这样工作
content.en_text: Caller: Yes, ideally I'd prefer the new office to be split over two levels so that the working

content.cn_text: 办公区能和街面层分开。
content.en_text: office area is kept separate from street level.

content.cn_text: 这样我们就可以把接待处设在一楼，用来迎接客户。
content.en_text: That will enable us to locate a reception at ground floor level to welcome customers when

content.cn_text: 当他们到达时。
content.en_text: they arrive.

content.cn_text: Agent：您需要哪些特定设施吗？
content.en_text: Agent: And are there any particular facilities that you need?

content.cn_text: Caller：我们的员工一整天都很努力工作，我想确保他们
content.en_text: Caller: Our employees work very hard throughout the day, and I want to make sure that they're

content.cn_text: 吃得好。
content.en_text: well nourished.

content.cn_text: 因此，如果我能给他们提供一个厨房，让他们午餐时做热饭，那就理想了。
content.en_text: It would therefore be ideal if I could provide them with a kitchen to cook hot meals at lunchtime.

content.cn_text: Agent：您希望厨房和办公室一起位于二楼吗？
content.en_text: Agent: Would you want the kitchen to be located at first floor level with the office?

content.cn_text: Caller：不，我不希望办公室里充满食物味。
content.en_text: Caller: No, I don't want the office to be filled with the smell of food.

content.cn_text: 如果新办公室有地下室会更好，我们可以把厨房
content.en_text: It would be better if the new office had a basement where we could locate the kitchen

content.cn_text: 和员工休息区设在那里，使其远离工作区。
content.en_text: and staff room area to keep it at arm's length from the workspace.

content.cn_text: Agent：好的，我现在已经把搜索范围缩小到两处可用房产。
content.en_text: Agent: Okay, I have now narrowed the search to two available properties.

content.cn_text: 您还有其他要求可以让我们把结果缩小到一个吗？
content.en_text: Do you have any other requirements that could narrow our search down to one result?

content.cn_text: Caller：我们所有办公室员工都会使用台式电脑工作，所以我需要办公室
content.en_text: Caller: All of our office staff will be working at desktop computers, so I'll need the office

content.cn_text: 尽可能配备至少40个电源插座。
content.en_text: to be equipped with at least 40 power sockets if possible.

content.cn_text: Agent：还有其他要求吗？
content.en_text: Agent: Anything else?

content.cn_text: Caller：研究表明，运动对保持快乐和健康大脑功能很重要。
content.en_text: Caller: Studies have shown that exercise is very important for maintaining happiness and healthy
brain function.

content.cn_text: 在办公环境中，很难获得足够的日常运动。
content.en_text: In an office environment, it's very difficult to get sufficient daily exercise.

content.cn_text: 所以如果他们能使用附近的运动区域就很好。
content.en_text: So it would be great if they had access to a nearby exercise area.

content.cn_text: Agent：其中一处可用办公室就在健身房隔壁。这合适吗？
content.en_text: Agent: One of the available offices is located next door to a gym. Would this be suitable?

content.cn_text: Caller：是的，非常合适。
content.en_text: Caller: Yes, absolutely.

content.cn_text: 健身房正是我想要的。
content.en_text: A gym is exactly what I was thinking of.

content.cn_text: Agent：太好了。
content.en_text: Agent: Brilliant.

content.cn_text: 您需要办公室配家具吗？
content.en_text: Do you need the office to be furnished?

content.cn_text: Caller：我想不需要。
content.en_text: Caller: I don't think so.

content.cn_text: 我已经有一些家具，所以我更愿意自己带来。
content.en_text: I already have some furniture, so I would prefer to bring this myself.

content.cn_text: Agent：完全没问题。
content.en_text: Agent: That's no problem at all.

content.cn_text: Caller：还有，差点忘了，我们肯定需要 Wi-Fi，因为很多工作和客户
content.en_text: Caller: And before I forget, we will definitely require Wi-Fi access, as much of our work and customer

content.cn_text: 招募都是在线进行的。
content.en_text: recruitment is carried out online.

content.cn_text: Agent：没问题。
content.en_text: Agent: No problem.

content.cn_text: 听起来这处房产会完全符合您的需求。
content.en_text: It sounds like the property will suit your needs perfectly.

content.cn_text: 我已擅自为您预约了星期四下午3点看房，这样您可以亲自看看。
content.en_text: I've taken the liberty of booking you a viewing at 3pm on Thursday, so you can see it
for yourself.

content.cn_text: 今天还有其他可以帮您的吗？
content.en_text: Is there anything else I can help you with today?

content.cn_text: Caller：没有了，我想这就是我需要的全部信息。
content.en_text: Caller: No, I think that's all the information I need.

content.cn_text: 非常感谢你的帮助。
content.en_text: Thanks very much for your help.

content.cn_text: Agent：没问题。
content.en_text: Agent: No problem.

content.cn_text: 很高兴能帮到您。
content.en_text: It's been my pleasure to be of assistance.

content.cn_text: 再见。
content.en_text: Goodbye.

content.cn_text: 第一部分到此结束。
content.en_text: That is the end of section 1.

content.cn_text: 你现在有半分钟时间检查答案。
content.en_text: You now have half a minute to check your answers.

content.cn_text: 现在请翻到第二部分。
content.en_text: Now turn to section 2.

content.cn_text: 请等待答案。
content.en_text: Please wait for the answers.

content.cn_text: 非常感谢。
content.en_text: Thank you very much.

content.cn_text: 非常感谢。
content.en_text: Thank you very much.

content.cn_text: 再见。
content.en_text: Bye.

groups.desc:
Complete the notes below.
Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS AND/OR A NUMBER
groups.title: Questions 1-10

items.title: Type of company: 1. ______
items.analysis: 答案解析：第1题问 Type of company。原文说 my advertising company，所以答案是 Advertising。

items.title: Position: 2. ______
items.analysis: 答案解析：第2题问 Position。原文说以前是 sales manager，但最近 promoted to regional manager，所以答案是 Regional Manager。

items.title: Location: near the 3. ______
items.analysis: 答案解析：第3题问 Location: near the ______。原文说他更希望 close proximity to the station，所以答案是 Station。Shopping Centre 是第一个地址附近，但被认为不合适。

items.title: Preferred size of the area: 4. ______ ft²
items.analysis: 答案解析：第4题问 Preferred size of the area。原文说 10,000 square feet would be more suitable，所以答案是 10,000。8000 是普通办公室大小。

items.title: 24-hour 5. ______
items.analysis: 答案解析：第5题问 Requirements: 24-hour ______。原文说 security should be 24 hour，所以答案是 Security。12 hours 是进入办公室的时间。

items.title: 6. ______ on ground floor
items.analysis: 答案解析：第6题问 ______ on ground floor。原文说 locate a reception at ground floor level，所以答案是 Reception。

items.title: a (an) 7. ______ to cook in
items.analysis: 答案解析：第7题问 Preferred facilities: a/an ______ to cook in。原文说 provide them with a kitchen to cook hot meals，所以答案是 Kitchen。

items.title: a (an) 8. ______ away from the workspace
items.analysis: 答案解析：第8题问 a/an ______ away from the workspace。原文说希望有 basement 来放 kitchen 和 staff room，使其远离工作区，所以答案是 Basement。

items.title: Daily exercise: a (an) 9. ______
items.analysis: 答案解析：第9题问 Daily exercise: a/an ______。原文说附近有 gym，并且客人确认 gym 正是他想要的，所以答案是 Gym。

items.title: Unnecessary: 10. ______
items.analysis: 答案解析：第10题问 Unnecessary。原文说不需要 furnished，因为他已有 furniture，所以不必要的是 Furniture。

groups.source_collect:
Complete the notes below.
Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS AND/OR A NUMBER
Office Rental
Example Address: 21 North Avenue
Type of company: $1$
Full name: Jonathan Smith
Position: $2$
Location: near the $3$
No. of people: 30
Preferred size of the area: $4$ ft²
Requirements:
• 24-hour $5$
• $6$ on ground floor
Preferred facilities:
• a (an) $7$ to cook in
• a (an) $8$ away from the workspace
No. of power sockets: 40
Daily exercise: a (an) $9$
Unnecessary: $10$
Other requirements: WIFI
Arrangement of viewing: 3 p.m on Thursday

source_label: 🍠@Listening 永不虾滑 · 仅供个人学习
source_credit: 此内容由🍠@Listening 永不虾滑整理，仅作为分享供个人使用；禁止商用、倒卖和引流。有问题请先仔细看🍠这个账号的置顶和分享贴。没有团队，不是机构，纯个人分享。督学和其他相关课程请咨询主页另一个号@心情有点虾滑（不回任何机经相关消息）。
